title: I Aliki sto Naftiko
actors: Aliki Vougiouklaki, Dimitris Papamichael, Giannis Gionakis
plot: The frustration of an unkept promise and an insuppressible youthful rebellion lead to an unprecedented act of love, as the daughter of the Hellenic Naval Academy's commander and a fourth-year cadet meet again in the strangest of p...
